entries.title: Terminator Architecture
entries.summary: Process model, IPC contract, data model, terminal session lifecycle, extension system, state management, CSS token strategy, Task Vault architecture, and MergeFlow subsystem.

entries.title: Terminator README
entries.summary: Feature list, tech stack, prerequisites, quick start, npm scripts, keyboard shortcuts.

entries.title: Task Vault Extension README
entries.summary: Feature list, MCP server setup, available tools, auto-execute toggles, task ID format.

entries.title: Extension API Contract
entries.summary: Full surface of ExtensionAPI passed to activate(api) — all namespaces, method signatures, and version annotations. Also documents renderer-registry-only surfaces (WorkspaceTabRegistration, registerWorkspaceTab, activeWorkspaceTabId) added in v1.3.0.

entries.title: IPC Channels Contract (core)
entries.summary: Core IPC channel specifications: terminal:*, workspace:*, project:*, settings:*, dialog:*, extension:*, fs:*, notification.*.

entries.title: Extension Development Guide
entries.summary: How to build, test, and publish extensions. Extension API reference, CSS token contract, manifest schema. Covers global tabs vs workspace-scoped tabs (v1.3.0).

entries.title: Contributing Guide
entries.summary: Development workflow, npm scripts, test coverage requirements, PR checklist.

entries.title: Task Vault Data Model
entries.summary: SQLite-first entity model for tasks, projects, areas, recurrence, daily logs, inbox, and CalendarEvent. UUID v4 IDs. Supersedes markdown-file/filepath:line architecture.
